# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13.3)

# The zcbor-generated files can be regenerated by calling this file with -DREGENERATE_ZCBOR=Y
# This will call zcbor to regenerate the files, and then build like usual.
if (REGENERATE_ZCBOR)
  set (zcbor_command
    zcbor code
    --encode
    --short-names # Attempt to make generated symbol names shorter (at the risk of collision)
    -c ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/sensors/bme280/zcbor/bme280.cddl
    -t ZcborPayloadBME280
    --output-cmake ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/sensors/bme280/zcbor/bme280.cmake
    --output-h ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/sensors/bme280/zcbor/bme280_encode.h
    --output-c ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/sensors/bme280/zcbor/bme280_encode.c
  )
  execute_process(COMMAND ${zcbor_command})
endif()

# Include the cmake file generated by the regenerate_zcbor.sh file. It adds the
# generated code and the necessary zcbor C code files.
include(${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/sensors/bme280/bme280.cmake)

# Link the library from pet.cmake
target_link_libraries(app PRIVATE bme280_encode)

# Add the directory containing pet1.h
target_include_directories(app PRIVATE ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/sensors/bme280/zcbor)
